title: Man attacked, tied up and robbed in his farmhouse on the R404
description: GEORGE NEWS - A man was attacked and robbed...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GEORGE NEWS - A man was attacked and robbed at his home on a farm along the R404 between Blanco and the George Airport last night, Friday 5 September.


> According to information received, the victim was assaulted inside his house, tied up by his hands and feet, and left until he was discovered today.


The extent of his injuries can't be confirmed at this stage, but he refused medical treatment.

The suspects allegedly fled with several items, including a shotgun. At this stage, it is unclear whether any arrests have been made.

A media enquiry has been sent to the police for confirmation and further details, and updates will be published as soon as official information becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
